policy: exact official-site clone — public Gwangju Buk-gu portal (https://bukgu.gwangju.kr) rendered verbatim, no summary/redesign/approximation
source_url_domain_policy: source_url must be under https://bukgu.gwangju.kr (official public Buk-gu portal). Any other host is rejected.
network_required_at_runtime_policy: normal tests must not require external lookup; network_required_at_runtime must be false for all registered pages.
completeness_note: No complete official content fixtures are committed in this repository as of base SHA afa40dd6f9f0edfd4127ae9fbb542dba73c1c880. The MVP left surface renders official page structure from committed source-derived render functions and approved image crops, but no full-row / full-cell official page fixture file exists yet. Per the invariant (fixture-less official-page renderer is prohibited, and synthetic data must not be disguised as official fixture), no page is registered here until a complete official fixture is committed. Pages requiring complete capture are tracked in the final report under 'complete capture required'.
